title: lellingeria aethiopica
intro: Lellingeria aethiopica, also known as the Ethiopian climbing fern or the climbing fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Lellingeria aethiopica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
